case_title: ROSALINA T LYDSTER VS. EVA VALDEBENITO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-23-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEBENITO, EVA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,946.07 FILED BY LYDSTER, ROSALINA T AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEBENITO, EVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYDSTER, ROSALINA T IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VALDEBENITO, EVA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
